mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (`쉼표번호`, email, password, username, nickname, status, email_verified, role) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{email}, #{password}, #{username}, #{nickname}, 'active', 0, 'USER')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND status = 'active'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND status = 'active'
SELECT `쉼표번호` FROM users WHERE role = 'USER' ORDER BY `쉼표번호` DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO email_verification (`쉼표번호`, token, verified, expires_at) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{token}, 0, #{expiresAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE email_verification SET verified = 1 WHERE token = #{token}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO password_reset_token (`쉼표번호`, token, expires_at, used) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{token}, #{expiresAt}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE password_reset_token SET used = 1 WHERE token = #{token}
